name: artifact-fields
description: Artifact field validation per pack.md Section 4
notes: referenced_artifact_tests are OPTIONAL. Implementations that do not support referenced artifacts MAY skip these tests.

embedded_artifact_tests.name: valid_embedded_artifact
embedded_artifact_tests.description: Valid embedded artifact with all required fields

embedded_artifact_tests.name: embedded_missing_path
embedded_artifact_tests.description: path is required for embedded artifacts

embedded_artifact_tests.name: embedded_missing_digest
embedded_artifact_tests.description: digest is required for embedded artifacts

embedded_artifact_tests.name: embedded_missing_size
embedded_artifact_tests.description: size is required for embedded artifacts

referenced_artifact_tests.name: valid_reference_with_digest
referenced_artifact_tests.description: Valid referenced artifact with optional digest

referenced_artifact_tests.name: valid_reference_without_digest
referenced_artifact_tests.description: Referenced artifact without digest is valid (informational only)

referenced_artifact_tests.name: reference_missing_name
referenced_artifact_tests.description: name is required for referenced artifacts

referenced_artifact_tests.name: reference_missing_uri
referenced_artifact_tests.description: uri is required for referenced artifacts

referenced_artifact_tests.name: reference_missing_access
referenced_artifact_tests.description: access object with policy is required

embedded_notes: Per pack.md Section 4: Embedded artifacts require type, path, digest, size. Referenced artifacts require type, name, uri, access.policy.
referenced_notes: Referenced artifact support is OPTIONAL per pack.md Section 4.1. Implementations MAY choose to support only embedded artifacts.
